title: Secretary Spec — Temporal Continuity Ledger (TCL)

downstream: secretary_spec_ratio_lattice_ledger_stub (scoring eventually reads TCL for outcome learning)

integration_points: Calendar view — one cell per day, clickable, shows read-only day ledger
Grid generator — ingests yesterday.tcl.json + today.tcl.json (in-progress) alongside Mission Control bedrock
why_it_matters: Makes Secretary remember. Right now each morning grid is generated fresh from static state. TCL gives it a running river of what's already happened, so today's proposals are informed by yesterday's outcomes. The missing temporal dimension.
open_questions: Day-boundary semantics: midnight local vs. 'until Jake ends the day'?
notable[] criteria: auto-tagged from sore-thumb signals, Jake-flagged in the moment, or both?
Calendar view density: single month vs. rolling 30-day strip? Mobile-first vs. desktop-grid?
Grid generator read window: yesterday only, or rolling N days?
